title: Innovative Light Irish Red Snapper Roast
description: A roasted Irish dish featuring red snapper, cure, and lacto-vegetarian friendly ingredients, perfect for a light and energizing meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the Irish sea salt, brown sugar, and pink peppercorns.
Place the red snapper fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle the salt mixture evenly over the red snapper fillets.
Drizzle the lemon juice and olive oil over the fillets.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley and minced garlic over the fillets.
Dot the top of each fillet with butter.
Roast the red snapper in the preheated oven for 12 minutes.
Remove the red snapper from the oven and let it rest for 2 minutes.
Serve the red snapper hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
